How it works

Study. Earn. Unlock.

Every session moves you forward. Every task earns XP. Every level brings a new world.

⚔
Start a Focus Session

Set your timer — 25, 50, or 90 minutes. Hit Start. A lofi chime plays when time's up. The timer keeps running even when the popup is closed.

🌱
Earn XP Every Session

Complete sessions to earn XP. Build a daily streak for multipliers — 3 days = 1.2x, 7 days = 1.5x, 14 days = 2x. Completing tasks earns XP too.

🗺️
Unlock New Worlds

Reach level 3 and the Lighthouse Skyroom opens. Level 6 brings the Hanging Garden. Keep climbing toward the Crystal Cave at level 15.

📋
Track Your Tasks

Add tasks tagged by subject — Maths, Physics, CS, or your own custom subjects. Complete a full subject's tasks for a bonus XP reward.

🔥
Build Your Streak

Study every day to grow your streak. Premium users get 3 Streak Shields per month — so one missed day doesn't erase weeks of progress.

📊
See Your Progress

Weekly focus chart, session history, subject breakdown, and a full progression roadmap showing every level and what it unlocks.
